message:
fix: add keyboard navigation to 3 cards (partial #8837) (#8951)

Adds onKeyDown handlers + role=button + tabIndex=0 to clickable divs
in ClusterDropZone, HardwareHealthCard (2 divs), and PodSweeper grid
cells so they can be activated via keyboard.

- ClusterDropZone: Enter/Space triggers handleClick (workload drop)
- HardwareHealthCard: Enter/Space drills into node on alert + inventory
- PodSweeper: Enter/Space reveals cell, F flags it (mirrors right-click)
- Focus rings added for visual feedback

Partial fix for #8837 (Auto-QA A11y: Keyboard Navigation).
Remaining components to be addressed in follow-up PRs per the 50-line
size guidance from Auto-QA.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
